title: Internal Ops Cleanup
brief_text: Ops team is drowning in spreadsheets, slack requests, handoffs, manual updates, and random reporting. Need one place to track blockers, maybe approvals, maybe dashboards, maybe reminders. Keep it local-first.

title: Internal Reporting Tool
brief_text: Internal operations team needs a local-first weekly reporting tool for coordinators. Goals: reduce manual reporting and give one place to review blockers. Budget under $10k.

title: Internal Intake Workflow
brief_text: Need an internal workflow for support intake and issue triage. The operations team will use it daily and wants fewer manual handoffs. Budget is approved but nobody has picked the first interface yet.

title: Internal Multi Workflow Suite
brief_text: Build an internal full suite for requests, approvals, dashboards, reminders, and reporting. Ship it fast in 2 weeks, keep it cheap, and keep the budget under $5k.

title: Internal Review Console
brief_text: An internal review console should help the operations team review exceptions and re-run failed jobs. Keep it local-first and keep the first milestone narrow.
